shortDescription.en: Crawl any live Shopify store and audit for Google Merchant Center Misrepresentation policy risks — no API token required
shortDescription.zh: 无需 API 授权，直接爬取真实上线的 Shopify 店铺，检测 GMC Misrepresentation 政策风险

longDescription.en: Simulates how Google's crawler sees your Shopify store. Runs a two-phase audit: Phase A checks store-level identity, policies, pricing integrity, social proof, urgency widgets, and technical infrastructure. Phase B deep-crawls sampled products with full JSON-LD multi-block analysis, variant state, and claims detection. Produces a single HTML report with risk score, prioritized findings, evidence, a Manual Checklist (MC-01 to MC-07) for items requiring merchant verification, and a staged remediation plan.
longDescription.zh: 模拟 Google 爬虫视角审查你的 Shopify 店铺。分两阶段审计：A 阶段检查店铺级身份、政策、定价完整性、社会证明、紧迫感组件和技术基础设施；B 阶段对采样商品进行深度爬取，包含完整 JSON-LD 多块分析、变体状态和声明检测。输出单文件 HTML 报告，含风险评分、优先级发现、证据、需商家手动核查的 Checklist（MC-01 至 MC-07）以及分阶段修复计划。

introduction.en: Find out exactly why your GMC account was suspended — or prevent suspension before it happens — with a full automated store crawl and prioritized HTML audit report.
introduction.zh: 通过全自动店铺爬取和优先级 HTML 审计报告，精准定位 GMC 账号被暂停的原因，或在暂停发生前提前预防。

description.en: Phase A covers store-level identity, policies, pricing, and technical checks. Phase B deep-crawls sampled products with JSON-LD multi-block analysis.
description.zh: A 阶段覆盖店铺级身份、政策、定价和技术检查；B 阶段对采样商品进行 JSON-LD 多块深度分析。

description.en: Crawls only public pages — no Shopify Admin API token needed. Works on any live Shopify store.
description.zh: 仅爬取公开页面，无需 Shopify Admin API 授权，适用于任何已上线的 Shopify 店铺。

description.en: Single-file HTML report with risk score, prioritized findings, evidence, Manual Checklist, official GMC reference links, and staged remediation plan.
description.zh: 单文件 HTML 报告，含风险评分、优先级发现、证据、手动核查清单、官方 GMC 参考链接和分阶段修复计划。

description.en: Scans all page links to find policy pages at any URL path, including custom /pages/ paths. Detects empty policy content and suggests migration to canonical /policies/ paths.
description.zh: 扫描所有页面链接，发现任意路径下的政策页面（包括自定义 /pages/ 路径），检测空内容并建议迁移到规范 /policies/ 路径。
